reviews.review_title: This guy sa's people look out
reviews.review_description: Title

May I please have moderator. I will make the community less toxic and I will make sure people are happy while playing. And I will get more people to download than ever. To anyone who reads this, have a good day. And to the owner,Thank you. And one last thing....I bought the mod menu.

reviews.review_title: Can I have my gun back
reviews.review_description: I had a gun when I got back in to the game that I guess was from past versions so can I have it back please, when I went to go put on a different holdable it took my gun away
Hello,I’m asking for mod if you want to know if I’m fit for it pls contact me on my discord cacaman5678#3591. I am comfortable with a voice call but I would prefer it to be on text.
Plz

reviews.review_title: amazing game and would want to be mod
reviews.review_description:
I love this game and it’s awesome and I would like to be a moderator
I will ONLY KICK players that are being toxic or doing things against the code of conduct
I will NOT KICK players that are playing right and abiding to the code of conduct
It keeps kicking me right when I get in fix please
Owner is very nice also would recommend this game has very nice mods and has a very nice community:)
Butbim rating it a four I will change my rating when the mod menu is cheaper

developer_response.body: if u dont want the mod menu dont buy it its simple lol (not to be rude)

reviews.review_description: I met nobody at all it's like it's a ghost town so please tell me what time people play but all aside from that it's a great game
Hello, can I please have moderator, It’s fine if I cant but I can make a high quality video for this game.

reviews.review_title: Can I get my cosmetics back?
reviews.review_description: I lost my old cosmetics like golden glasses OG hat and everything else can I be moderator so I can help the community?
The game is sick can I be a mod for I can ban racist people
It’s a good game and the community is nice and I even met the owner and a moderator

reviews.review_title: I give you 1 millionI give you 1 million
reviews.review_description:
Can you please make me moderator I’ve bought your mod menu and I love your game and I’ve been playing too intense came out and I love it you’re a game that you made so yeah, cause I used to be a moderator in my own games and someone took it away but I just wanna be a moderator in the game because I bought more lemonade please and thank you
￼ And I love your update, and can you probably make me my menu in like two hours three

Hey I'm hoping I could be a moderator and I will not just act all cool and say hahah im a moderator and ill ban you hehehe but instead ill just watch all the toxic kids that kick or ban them. If you saw this please reply
Hi, can I get Moderator? If you can check out my YouTube channel GoldVR, I will make a video on it if you give me Moderator.
The only thing he needs to remove is the horror mode
I played this game and I loved it
I met the owner and moderator and they are the most chillest people I have met and it is also a fun game and there cool ￼Cosmetics and pool my new favorite game￼
